mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Users ( user_id, -- 로그인용 아이디 password, -- 암호화된 비밀번호 name, age, gender, height, weight, target_glucose, max_insulin_daily ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{height}, #{weight}, IFNULL(#{targetGlucose}, 100.0), -- 입력 없으면 기본값 100 IFNULL(#{maxInsulinDaily}, 50.0) -- 입력 없으면 기본값 50 )
mapper.update: UPDATE Users SET weight = #{weight}, height = #{height}, target_glucose = #{targetGlucose}, max_insulin_daily = #{maxInsulinDaily} WHERE id = #{id}
